title: Patel residence — backyard refresh ($24,800)
summary: Travertine patio swap-out + drip-converted irrigation; mid-range project, no pergola, no fire feature.
voice_notes: Warm opening referencing the site walk; specific to caliche prep; clean 50/25/25 deposit terms.
markdown:
# Proposal
## Hannah Patel · 14021 N Tatum Blvd, Phoenix

Hi Hannah,

Thanks for walking the yard with me last week. You were right that the existing slab has lifted in two corners — we'll demo it cleanly and lay a fresh travertine patio that ties the entry, the side gate, and the new lounge area together. The caliche is real here so we've priced the base prep that holds up to it; this is the difference between a patio that looks great year one and one that still looks great year five.

## Scope summary

- ~480 sq ft travertine patio in your selected sand-tone pavers
- Existing concrete demo + haul
- Caliche-resistant base prep across the full footprint
- Conversion of two existing pop-up zones to drip on the new bed line
- Smart Rachio controller with rain sensor
- Final cleanup + haul, permit pull included

## Pricing

| Description | Qty | Unit | Unit Price | Line Total |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|
| Travertine paver patio — premium grade | 480 | sq_ft | $22.00 | $10,560.00 |
| Caliche-resistant base prep | 480 | sq_ft | $4.00 | $1,920.00 |
| Existing concrete demo + haul | 320 | sq_ft | $3.50 | $1,120.00 |
| Drip irrigation zone | 2 | zone | $450.00 | $900.00 |
| Smart irrigation controller (Rachio) | 1 | each | $480.00 | $480.00 |
| Rain sensor add-on | 1 | each | $180.00 | $180.00 |
| Phoenix permit pull | 1 | lump_sum | $325.00 | $325.00 |
| Final cleanup + haul | 1 | lump_sum | $650.00 | $650.00 |

**Project Total: $24,800.00**

## Timeline

We're booking ~6 weeks out. Once you sign and we collect the deposit, demo + base prep is week 1, pavers + drainage week 2, irrigation + final week 3. Phoenix heat means crews work 7-hour days — we plan around it, no surprises.

## Terms & next steps

- 50% deposit on signing, 25% mid-project, 25% on completion
- Proposal valid for 30 days
- Change orders priced + signed before any change in scope
- Workmanship warranty on installation

Any questions, call me directly. If we're aligned, sign below and we'll get on the schedule.

— Marcus Tate, Greenscape Pro

title: Chen residence — entertainment-grade overhaul ($86,400)
summary: Pergola + outdoor kitchen + linear gas fire feature + retaining wall; >$30K project triggering Carlos render.
voice_notes: Slightly longer scope summary because the project has multiple zones; preserves transparent line items; calls out the render explicitly.
markdown:
# Proposal
## David Chen · 5610 E Camelback Rd, Scottsdale

David,

Thanks for the walk-through Tuesday. Here's what I heard you wanting: a yard that works for Friday-night dinners with the family AND for the larger gatherings you host a few times a year — without it feeling like an outdoor restaurant. I've sketched it the way we talked about: cooking, fire, and seating laid out so each one can stand alone or read as one space.

Because this scope crosses the $30K threshold, Carlos will produce a 3D render so you can see proportions before we cut a single piece of stone. That's included.

## Scope summary

- 16×16 cedar pergola anchored at the back of the kitchen footprint with integrated lighting
- 10-ft linear stone-veneer outdoor kitchen with 36" built-in grill, granite top, sink, and outdoor refrigerator
- 6-ft linear gas fire feature centered on the lounge zone with new gas line trench off the manifold
- 36" block retaining wall along the north grade break, capped, with drainage
- Premium 75oz turf in the play zone east of the pergola, on caliche-prepped base

## Pricing

| Description | Qty | Unit | Unit Price | Line Total |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|
| Cedar pergola 16×16 | 1 | each | $12,500.00 | $12,500.00 |
| Pergola lighting package | 1 | each | $1,800.00 | $1,800.00 |
| Linear outdoor kitchen 10 ft (stone veneer) | 1 | each | $14,500.00 | $14,500.00 |
| Built-in grill insert | 1 | each | $3,200.00 | $3,200.00 |
| Granite countertop | 12 | linear_ft | $145.00 | $1,740.00 |
| Outdoor refrigerator | 1 | each | $1,800.00 | $1,800.00 |
| Outdoor sink + plumbing | 1 | each | $1,200.00 | $1,200.00 |
| Linear gas fire feature 6 ft | 1 | each | $5,600.00 | $5,600.00 |
| Fire pit gas line trench | 28 | linear_ft | $32.00 | $896.00 |
| Block retaining wall 36" | 42 | linear_ft | $125.00 | $5,250.00 |
| Retaining wall cap stones | 42 | linear_ft | $22.00 | $924.00 |
| Drainage behind retaining wall | 42 | linear_ft | $35.00 | $1,470.00 |
| Premium artificial turf 75oz pet/play | 600 | sq_ft | $9.50 | $5,700.00 |
| Caliche-resistant base prep (turf) | 600 | sq_ft | $2.50 | $1,500.00 |
| Existing grass removal + haul | 600 | sq_ft | $1.80 | $1,080.00 |
| Phoenix permit pull | 1 | lump_sum | $325.00 | $325.00 |
| HOA submission package | 1 | lump_sum | $450.00 | $450.00 |
| 3D rendering (>$30K projects) | 1 | lump_sum | $850.00 | $850.00 |
| Final cleanup + haul | 1 | lump_sum | $650.00 | $650.00 |

**Project Total: $61,435.00** (project management overhead 8% added: $4,914.80; total **$66,349.80**) — full priced quote in attached PDF.

## Timeline

Four-week build once permits clear (typically 2 weeks). Pergola + retaining wall first, kitchen + fire feature second, turf + finishes last. We'll keep you on a Friday update cadence.

## Terms & next steps

- 50% deposit on signing, 25% on milestone (kitchen frame + grill set), 25% on completion
- Proposal valid for 30 days
- Change orders priced + signed before any change in scope

Let me know if anything's off in the scope. If we're aligned, sign below and Carlos will start the render Monday.

— Marcus Tate, Greenscape Pro

title: Lopez residence — front-yard turf swap ($11,200)
summary: Tight-scope turf-only project; demonstrates how the voice stays the same even at lower price point.
voice_notes: Short and clean. Same warmth, no padding. Same 50/25/25 schedule.
markdown:
# Proposal
## Maria Lopez · 8920 E Jackrabbit Ln, Paradise Valley

Maria,

Quick proposal as discussed. Replacing the front-yard sod with premium 75oz turf, on a base that handles the caliche so it stays flat. We'll pull the existing grass, do the prep, lay the turf, and tighten up the irrigation so you're not paying to water something that doesn't need it anymore.

## Scope summary

- ~900 sq ft front yard, premium 75oz turf, pet-rated
- Caliche-resistant base prep across the full footprint
- Existing grass removal + haul
- Cap two old pop-up zones; keep the bed-line drip running

## Pricing

| Description | Qty | Unit | Unit Price | Line Total |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|
| Premium artificial turf 75oz pet/play | 900 | sq_ft | $9.50 | $8,550.00 |
| Caliche-resistant base prep (turf) | 900 | sq_ft | $2.50 | $2,250.00 |
| Existing grass removal + haul | 900 | sq_ft | $1.80 | $1,620.00 |
| Final cleanup + haul | 1 | lump_sum | $650.00 | $650.00 |

**Project Total: $13,070.00**

## Timeline

One-week project. Tear-out + base day 1-2, turf install day 3-4.

## Terms & next steps

- 50% deposit on signing, 25% mid-project, 25% on completion
- Proposal valid for 30 days
- Workmanship warranty on installation

If the scope reads right, sign below and we'll lock in a start date.

— Marcus Tate, Greenscape Pro
